expected_edges.why: txn 4 returns A_0000 from txn 0; txn 5 is the immediate next write on A_0000 and flips it below threshold
txn 5 returns B_0000 from txn 1; txn 6 is the immediate next write on B_0000 and flips it below threshold
txn 6 returns C_0000 from txn 2; txn 7 is the immediate next write on C_0000 and flips it below threshold
txn 7 returns D_0000 from txn 3; txn 4 is the immediate next write on D_0000 and flips it below threshold
